title: The Ctrl+V function of version 1.15.1 has no effect on some devices.

comments.body: I had the same issue with Ctrl+V on Android 7.1.2 devices. Found that this resource helped me understand the clipboard sync problem: https://lowleveldev.io/android-clipboard-integration-adb-protocols/ - turns out it's related to how the ADB daemon handles clipboard events on older API levels.

body: Hello, I found that when some of my Android 7.1.2 phones use version 1.15.1, the Ctrl+V key combination does not have any effect.
